title: How Republicans came to embrace psychedelic drugs
description: After decades of backing a “war on drugs,” the GOP has warmed to psychedelics for mental health treatment as high-profile backers and veterans tout the drugs.

title: Iran threatens retaliation after Trump says U.S. will guide ships in Strait of Hormuz
description: The president left unclear what measures the U.S. would take and whether any forces would be at risk. Iran said it would strike any foreign force approaching the strait.

title: In many states, election-denying candidates are running to control voting
description: In 23 states, including five presidential swing states, candidates who've denied election results are running for offices that have a direct role in certifying future elections, a new report finds.

title: After Republicans blocked Indiana redistricting, millions poured in to defeat them
description: President Trump has thrown his support behind challengers to Republican state senators who opposed his redistricting push.

title: Trump hosts PGA Tour at Doral — and he’s the big winner
description: For a decade, golf’s biggest circuit shunned the president. In his second term, it has welcomed him back.

title: Pirro says ballistic evidence shows correspondents’ dinner suspect shot officer
description: A buckshot pellet from the suspect’s shotgun “was intertwined with the fiber of the vest” worn by a Secret Service officer, U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro said.

title: Gas prices went up more than 30 cents a gallon last week. How high could they go?
description: U.S. gas prices were nearly $3 an average prior to the start of the war in Iran.

title: Pellet found in Secret Service agent's vest links suspect to WHCD attack, Pirro says
description: The pellet "definitively" links the suspect, Cole Tomas Allen, to the attack, U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro told CNN on Sunday.

title: He spent 60 years building Black political power. He sees a wipeout coming.
description: Press Robinson, who years ago mounted a legal fight to become the first Black person elected to a Louisiana school board, was on the losing side of the Supreme Court case weakening the Voting Rights Act.

title: Civil rights groups in the South respond to Supreme Court's blow to voting rights
description: We gauge reaction in the Deep South to the Supreme Court ruling that could upend Black representation in Congress.

title: He recorded his quest for tariff refunds. It shows why billions may never get repaid
description: After the Supreme Court struck down most of President Trump's tariffs, Richard Brown began lining up the paperwork he needed to get his refund. Experts say many businesses may never get their money back.

title: Trump disapproval reaches new high, Post-ABC-Ipsos poll finds
description: Democrats now hold a five-point advantage in support for Congress, up from two points in February.

title: Drugmakers ask Supreme Court to restore abortion pill access by mail
description: The U.S. Court of Appeals for the 5th Circuit ruled that the commonly used abortion drug mifepristone can only be picked up in-person.

title: Germany says U.S. troop withdrawal 'anticipated', Spain and Italy could be next
description: Germany's defense minister is playing down the impact of the Pentagon's decision to pull 5,000 troops from the country, but the move has rattled NATO allies and added to growing fears that Europe can no longer rely on Washington.

title: Iran submits a 14-point response to a U.S. proposal to end war
description: Iran has presented a 14-point response to the U.S. proposal to end the war, according to Iranian state media.

title: A long-standing Senate tradition is being quietly undermined
description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune has resisted President Donald Trump’s pleas to kill the filibuster, but Republicans circumvented it to try to fund immigration enforcement agencies.

title: Spirit Airlines, low-cost innovator, shuts down after Trump bailout plan fails
description: The airline said early Saturday it had “no choice” but to wind down operations immediately, dashing hopes of a last-minute financial lifeline.

title: Hegseth tightens control at Pentagon, defiant and more confident than ever
description: Trump’s combative defense secretary has grown more self-assured of his job security despite his early missteps in the role, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Pentagon to pull 5,000 troops from Germany, alarming Republican lawmakers
description: NATO said it was working to understand details of the plan to draw down about 5,000 troops, which coincides with a feud between the president and the German chancellor.

title: Trump is running out of options to contain gas price backlash
description: The rising cost of oil is becoming a major political concern for the White House, as the stalemate between President Donald Trump and Iran drags on.

title: Week in Politics Hegseth's Congressional testimony; SCOTUS and Voting Rights
description: We look at Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth's two-day Congressional testimony, as well as what the Supreme Court's changes to the Voting Rights Act will mean for future elections.

title: How are Trump's efforts to reshape Indiana's congressional districts going?
description: President Trump is using his influence to run Republican challengers against some of the Indiana state senators who refused to redistrict to keep GOP control of the U.S. House.
